title: Expand ontarch descriptor schema
outcome: Unit descriptor schema + the dependency-free ontarch validate gate. schemas/unit.schema.json validates the canon §10.1 fields (id, kind, title, status, system_space, domain, layer, paths.root, native.manifests, entrypoints, cli, capabilities.provides/requires, policy) with enums for kind/status/layer and additionalProperties:true so the richer panoply descriptor (cli/install/modules/runtime_manager) still validates. New ontarch toolchain (bash+awk+jq, no new deps): lib/common.sh (paths/logging), lib/descriptor.sh (awk reader for the regular TOML subset -> jq-assembled nested JSON + ontarch_find_descriptors discovery), bin/ontarch dispatcher, bin/ontarch-validate gate that reads required keys + enums FROM the schema (schema is source of truth). Descriptors: wfos workspace colocated at the workspace root; ds workspace central + status=planned (no dir scaffold, per decision); panoply brought up to schema (added title/status/paths.root/layer/domain, kept routing hints). Discovery is colocated-first (workspaces/<ws>/, wfos packages/apps) + central ontarch/descriptors override.
validation: GATE moon run ontarch:validate PASS — 3/3 descriptors (ds, panoply, wfos) validate against unit.schema.json (required present, enums in range, paths.root non-empty). bin/ontarch validate exit 0. shellcheck --severity=warning CLEAN on all 4 new bash files.
decisions: ontarch owns build-time metadata tasks (validate/sync) in bash+awk+jq — zero new deps, mirrors Panoply's E01-E03 precedent; ontarch still exposes no runtime CLI
descriptors use a regular TOML subset (top-level + single-bracket tables + single-line inline arrays) so an awk reader + jq can assemble nested JSON without a TOML library
validator reads required/enum from unit.schema.json rather than hardcoding them, so the schema stays the single source of truth
ds is a central planned descriptor (no directory scaffold); wfos is colocated at the workspace root; central overrides colocated for managed units
next: E04.S2 — registry generation (units/skills/profiles/policies json) + jq query cookbook
token_note: loaded 1 story block + 1 canon ref (§10.1) + STATE/ledger tail; one descriptor read answers what scanning packages/apps/moon.yml/READMEs would (token-cost note quantified in S2)
